original_prompt: 给这个手串做一张淘宝主图，要求深色背景的女性高级礼盒面板或者放点黑白的玫瑰，主文案居中，主文案：晶耀乾坤 灵佑安康  副文案：平安顺遂 白水晶
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
Modern Chinese E-commerce Jewelry Scene, Dark Luxury Gift Vibe. The product is a [single-strand beaded bracelet composed of uniformly sized, clear quartz crystal beads], positioned in the lower center to allow for centered text above. 
[Props]: Artistic monochrome black and white roses, premium dark velvet or matte paper gift box texture underneath. 
[Background]: Deep, rich dark tones (Black/Charcoal) to maximize contrast with the transparent beads. 
Lighting is [Dramatic Jewelry Spotlighting], focusing on the 'high refractive index' and 'specular highlights' of the spheres, making the clear quartz look icy, pristine, and glowing against the dark scene.

[Text & UI Layout]
***Layout Style**: Center-Aligned Vertical Layout (Upper Text, Lower Product).
Text Rendering Instructions (Must be High Contrast & Legible):
1. **Main Title**: Content: “晶耀乾坤 灵佑安康”. Position: [Center Top Negative Space]. Style: [Elegant Serif or Calligraphy, Metallic Silver/White, slight glow].
2. **Sub Title**: Content: “平安顺遂 白水晶”. Style: [Modern Sans-serif, White, smaller and spaced out].
3. **Marketing Banner**: Content: “礼赠首选”. Style: [Minimalist Gold Foil Stamp effect].
4. **Trust Badge**: Content: “天然甄选”. Style: [Translucent Glass Icon].
layout_logic: Considering the user requested 'Centered Main Text' (主文案居中) and a 'Dark Background', the most effective layout is a vertical stack. Place the text block in the upper 40% of the image (Negative Space) and the bracelet in the lower 60%, resting on the dark texture or roses. This prevents the text from obscuring the product details while maintaining a poster-like, premium hierarchy.
